SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-18-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:25 am
Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig, Clerk K. Liu, nothing on record, Dept. 525
Cause called for Small claims Appeal. Appellant Sharyn Loeb present in pro per. Respondents Ignacio Jato and Vincze Zsombor present in pro per. Witnesses Carlos Jato and Daniel Berko for respondents. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig.

EXRA: 30 days notices and e-mail correspondence collectively marked.
EXA1: Letter from respondents' attorney marked.

10:10 am
Exhibit retained, case submitted

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Continued To Jan-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Judgment Entered
